textByHash.9bf4d758257551d1f2fdb57b2bbcfaad3c56a3bd: La La La, toadies in their holeys! .. Oh hello, I didn't notice you.
textByHash.fa9707d6ad4be501a28db4b486082d7eda52af45: I look after the toads and worms. They are very useful in gnome cooking, don't you know.
textByHash.5fc9a403cef6bd5e7a451d87ba76f948bee9ab2d: Don't be silly, I just sing to pass the time while looking after them!
textByHash.a4877e50671ff7bd39520fdf97065fdb1d045eaf: Thank you kindly, you might want to grab some toads and worms while you are here.
